links.title: Name Players
links.tooltip: Name your players (use your server IP instead of localhost if remote)

panels.title: Connection Grade
panels.description: Gaming quality grade per peer. A+=excellent, F=unplayable. Based on RTT (35%), jitter (35%), loss (30%). Peers with blocked ICMP graded on jitter only.

panels.title: Active XLink Peers
panels.description: Live per-peer traffic stats for XLink Kai UDP tunneling (port 34523)

panels.title: Packet Activity (rate)
panels.description: Rate of change of cumulative packet counters - shows bursts and activity patterns

panels.title: Peer RTT (ICMP Ping)
panels.description: Round-trip time to each XLink Kai peer via ICMP ping every 10s

panels.title: Peer Packet Loss (ICMP)
panels.description: ICMP packet loss % to each XLink Kai peer

- SD: Squared deviation
- USD: Standard deviation without correction
- CSD: Standard deviation with correction (Bessel's)
- RANGE: Max-Min value range
panels.title: Standard Deviation Statistics (Jitter)
